seoTitle: Willowvale vs Wills — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Willowvale and Wills. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Willowvale and Wills.
heading: Willowvale vs Wills — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Willowvale, Queensland and Wills, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Willowvale has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Wills (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Willowvale or Wills safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Willowvale has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Wills scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Willowvale scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Wills scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Willowvale or Wills?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Willowvale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
